headline: Is It Time To Reassess Newmont (NEM) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether Newmont at around US$103.12 is still fairly priced or starting to look interesting, you are not alone. The stock has moved 5.1% over the last 7 days, is down 20.7% over the past month, yet is sitting on a 116.4% return over 1 year and 124.4% over 3 years, with a 1.9% return year to date and 91.8% over 5 years. These swings have kept Newmont firmly on the radar of investors who track large gold producers and related commodities, with sentiment shifting as the...

headline: Newmont Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
summary: DENVER, March 31, 2026--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) will release its first quarter 2026 results after North American markets close on Thursday, April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss the results will be held at 5:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time the same day, which is 7:30 a.m. Australian Eastern Standard Time on Friday, April 24, 2026. A replay of the webcast will be available through the Company’s website.
